candidate: REPOSE-LANDSCAPE: passive funnel loss-landscape regularizer maintaining critical-angle slope toward designated minimum via low-amplitude sand-throw probe (antlion conical pit analog).

summary: Two near-twin papers (ranks 7 and 8) explicitly describe repose-angle / critical-angle landscape regularizers sustaining passive basin self-restoration in LLM training, scoring >=0.90 on both semantic and functional axes with multiple keyword matches. Three additional prior-art hits (SAM, basin-like LLM loss landscape, curvature measure) cover adjacent flat-minima and perturbation-resilience mechanisms. Five of eight results are hits, indicating the candidate's specific mechanism is substantially anticipated by existing work.
